set-numeric-limit-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Numeric Limit for PDF Form Field Using SetFieldLimit
set-numeric-limit-for-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to apply a character limit to the 'Quantity' form field (allowing values 1‑100) in a PDF by using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.SetFieldLimit method.

add-list-item-to-pdf-dropdown.title: Add List Item to PDF Dropdown Field
add-list-item-to-pdf-dropdown.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor, add a new option to an existing dropdown (combo box) field, and save the updated document.

remove-list-item-from-pdf-form-field.title: Remove List Item from PDF Form Field
remove-list-item-from-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to delete a specific list item (Option B) from a list-type form field named "Choices" on page 4 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

copy-pdf-form-field-content.title: Copy PDF Form Field Content from SourceNotes to TargetNotes
copy-pdf-form-field-content.description: Shows how to read the value of a form field and write it to another field in the same PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

clone-pdf-form-field-to-another-document.title: Clone PDF Form Field to Another Document
clone-pdf-form-field-to-another-document.description: Shows how to copy the outer definition of a form field from a source PDF to a specific page of a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

move-pdf-form-field.title: Move PDF Form Field to New Position
move-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to relocate a form field named "DateField" to specific coordinates on page 2 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-form-field-from-pdf.title: Remove Form Field from PDF
remove-form-field-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete an existing form field from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

rename-pdf-form-field.title: Rename PDF Form Field Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
rename-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to rename a form field throughout a PDF document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class and persist the changes.

add-email-validation-javascript.title: Add Email Validation JavaScript to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-javascript.description: Creates a PDF with an Email text field and attaches JavaScript that validates the email format when the field loses focus.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Fields to FDF
export-pdf-form-fields-to-fdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form fields from a PDF document into an FDF file for external processing.

import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF Form
import-xfdf-data-into-pdf-form.description: Shows how to import form field values from an XFDF file into an existing PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form class.

batch-add-hidden-processeddate-field.title: Batch Add Hidden ProcessedDate Field with GUID to PDFs
batch-add-hidden-processeddate-field.description: Iterates through all PDF files in a folder, adds a hidden text form field named "ProcessedDate" on the first page, fills it with a newly generated GUID, and saves the documents.

decorate-checkbox-fields-in-pdfs.title: Decorate All Checkbox Fields in PDFs
decorate-checkbox-fields-in-pdfs.description: Shows how to apply a consistent visual style to every checkbox form field across multiple PDF files in a directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-update-submit-button-urls.title: Batch Update Submit Button URLs in PDFs
batch-update-submit-button-urls.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDF files and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor together with the Form facade to change the submit URL of every form submit button.

clear-and-populate-dropdown-list.title: Clear and Populate a PDF Dropdown List
clear-and-populate-dropdown-list.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing items from a PDF form dropdown (list box) field and then add new options using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

populate-pdf-listbox-with-country-names.title: Populate PDF ListBox with Country Names
populate-pdf-listbox-with-country-names.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF form and add 195 country names to a ListBox field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

set-field-readonly-currency-appearance.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only and Apply Currency Appearance
set-field-readonly-currency-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to make a PDF form field read‑only and adjust its appearance (e.g., for currency formatting) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

attach-js-clear-field.title: Attach JavaScript to Clear Text Field on Focus
attach-js-clear-field.description: Creates a PDF with a text field named DiscountCode and adds JavaScript that clears the field when it receives focus.

copy-form-field-definitions.title: Copy Form Field Definitions from Template PDF to Target PDF
copy-form-field-definitions.description: Demonstrates how to copy form field definitions from a template PDF to another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades Form and FormEditor classes.

move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.title: Move PDF Form Fields by Offset
move-pdf-form-fields-by-offset.description: Shows how to shift all form fields in a PDF document by a specified (10,15) offset using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

batch-rename-acroform-fields.title: Batch Rename AcroForm Fields from Old_ to New_
batch-rename-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to use the Form facade to iterate over PDF form fields, rename every field whose name starts with "Old_" to a "New_" prefix, and save the modified document.

set-text-field-to-multiline.title: Set Text Field to Multiline in PDF Form
set-text-field-to-multiline.description: Shows how to convert the single‑line text field "Comments" to a multiline field in an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-signature-field-border-thickness.title: Set Custom Border Thickness for Signature Field
set-signature-field-border-thickness.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a signature form field, and set its border width to 2 points using Aspose.Pdf.

set-form-field-background-color.title: Set Form Field Background Color to Light Green
set-form-field-background-color.description: Shows how to change the background color of a PDF form field named "Status" to light green using FormEditor and FormFieldFacade.

add-hidden-sessionid-field-batch.title: Add Hidden SessionId Field to PDFs in Batch
add-hidden-sessionid-field-batch.description: Creates sample PDFs and adds a hidden "SessionId" field with a GUID value to each PDF in a batch.

attach-javascript-validation-to-pdf-subm.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to PDF Submit Button
attach-javascript-validation-to-pdf-subm.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to add JavaScript that validates required fields to a PDF submit button and configure its submit URL.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form field definitions and their values from a PDF document into a JSON file.

import-form-fields-from-json.title: Import Form Fields from JSON into PDF
import-form-fields-from-json.description: Shows how to read a JSON file that defines form fields and import those fields into a newly created PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-field-limit-phone-number.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Form Field
set-field-limit-phone-number.description: Demonstrates how to limit the number of characters a user can enter in a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.SetFieldLimit method and then save the updated document.

set-date-field-format-pdf.title: Set Date Field Format in PDF Form
set-date-field-format-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, finds a DateField named "Date", and changes its display format to MM/dd/yyyy using Aspose.Pdf.

add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.title: Add Reset Form Button to PDF
add-reset-form-button-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a push button into a PDF that clears all form fields by attaching JavaScript using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

restrict-pdf-form-field-to-integer-range.title: Restrict PDF Form Field to Integer Range 0-100
restrict-pdf-form-field-to-integer-range.description: Shows how to configure a NumberField in a PDF so it only accepts digit characters and limits its length to represent values from 0 to 100 using Aspose.Pdf.

attach-javascript-validation-to-age-fiel.title: Attach JavaScript Validation to Age Field in PDF
attach-javascript-validation-to-age-fiel.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript snippet to a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to warn when the entered age is under 18.

copy-image-field-content-to-new-field.title: Copy Image Field Content to New PDF Form Field
copy-image-field-content-to-new-field.description: Demonstrates how to copy the inner appearance of an existing image form field to a new image field using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

remove-empty-pdf-form-field.title: Remove Empty PDF Form Field
remove-empty-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to read a PDF form field value and delete the field if it contains no user input, otherwise copying the original PDF unchanged.

rename-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.title: Rename PDF Form Fields Using a CSV Mapping
rename-pdf-form-fields-from-csv.description: Shows how to read a CSV file containing old and new field names and rename the corresponding form fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF
add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Shows how to add a visible signature field named "DigitalSignature" to a PDF and then sign it using a PKCS#1 certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

set-form-field-required.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required (Asterisk Indicator)
set-form-field-required.description: Demonstrates how to mark a PDF form field as required using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor, causing PDF viewers to display the asterisk indicator.

apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-text-field.title: Apply Custom Font to All PDF Form Text Fields
apply-custom-font-to-pdf-form-text-field.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to set the custom font 'Arial Bold' for every text form field in a PDF document.

add-selectall-checkbox-to-pdf-first-page.title: Add SelectAll Checkbox to PDF First Page
add-selectall-checkbox-to-pdf-first-page.description: Iterates over a collection of PDF files, adds an unchecked "SelectAll" checkbox field to the first page of each document, and saves the modified PDFs with a new suffix.

move-form-field-to-bottom-margin.title: Move Form Field to Bottom Margin on All PDF Pages
move-form-field-to-bottom-margin.description: Demonstrates how to reposition a specific form field to the bottom margin of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, calculating coordinates and applying the new appearance.

set-price-field-two-decimals.title: Set Price Field to Two Decimal Places and Update Appearance
set-price-field-two-decimals.description: Creates a PDF with a Price text field, formats its value to two decimal places, and modifies its appearance using FormEditor.SetFieldAppearance.

attach-javascript-to-pdf-form-field.title: Attach JavaScript to PDF Form Field
attach-javascript-to-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use FormEditor to attach a JavaScript action to the 'Quantity' field that calculates the total price and updates the 'TotalPrice' field, then save the modified document.

export-import-pdf-form-fields-xml.title: Export and Import PDF Form Fields Using XML
export-import-pdf-form-fields-xml.description: Demonstrates how to export form field data from a PDF to an XML file and later import it back into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facade.

import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml-preserve.title: Import PDF Form Fields from XML While Preserving Order
import-pdf-form-fields-from-xml-preserve.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, import form field values from an XML file using the Form facade, and keep the original field order by disabling template changes.

add-priority-list-box-to-pdf.title: Add List Box Field 'Priority' to PDF
add-priority-list-box-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a ListBox form field named "Priority" with items Low, Medium, High and set Medium as the default value using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

remove-button-fields-from-pdf.title: Remove Button Fields from PDF Form
remove-button-fields-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate all button form fields, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

batch-rename-duplicate-pdf-form-fields.title: Batch Rename Duplicate PDF Form Fields
batch-rename-duplicate-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to process a folder of PDFs, detect duplicate form field names across documents, and rename them with an incremental suffix using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-email-validation-script-to-pdf-form-.title: Add Email Validation Script to PDF Form Field
add-email-validation-script-to-pdf-form-.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript validation script to an existing PDF form field to enforce proper email syntax using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-hidden-version-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Hidden Version Field to PDF Form
add-hidden-version-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a hidden numeric text box named "Version" with a value of 2 into an existing PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-form-field-to-new-field-on-page-3.title: Copy PDF Form Field to New Field on a Specific Page
copy-form-field-to-new-field-on-page-3.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to copy the outer definition of an existing form field to a new field on a designated page and save the updated PDF.

move-signature-field-to-lower-right-corn.title: Move Signature Field to Lower-Right Corner on Page 5
move-signature-field-to-lower-right-corn.description: Shows how to reposition an existing form field named 'Signature' to the lower‑right corner of page 5 using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

enable-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form.title: Enable Rich Text Formatting for a PDF Form Field
enable-rich-text-formatting-for-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF form field to allow rich‑text input by setting its appearance and assigning a formatted value using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

add-javascript-to-pdf-form-load.title: Add JavaScript to PDF Form Load Event
add-javascript-to-pdf-form-load.description: Shows how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF so that the 'Date' form field is automatically filled with the current date when the document is opened.

export-checkbox-fdf.title: Export Checkbox Fields to FDF
export-checkbox-fdf.description: Creates a sample PDF with checkbox fields and exports only those checkbox definitions to an FDF file.

import-checkboxes-fdf-merge-pdf.title: Import Checkboxes from FDF and Merge into PDF
import-checkboxes-fdf-merge-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to import checkbox definitions from an FDF file into an existing PDF form, updating matching fields and adding new ones without creating duplicate field objects.

add-state-combo-box-to-pdf-form.title: Add State Combo Box to PDF Form
add-state-combo-box-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a combo box field named "State" on a PDF form and fill it with US state abbreviations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-non-whitelisted-items-from-pdf-li.title: Remove Non-Whitelisted Items from PDF List Field
remove-non-whitelisted-items-from-pdf-li.description: Shows how to delete list items from a PDF form field that are not part of a predefined whitelist using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.title: Make TaxRate Read‑Only and Auto‑Calculate with JavaScript
set-taxrate-readonly-calc-js.description: Demonstrates how to set a PDF form field to read‑only and attach JavaScript that calculates its value from another field using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

decorate-list-fields-uniform-border.title: Decorate List Fields with Uniform Border and Background
decorate-list-fields-uniform-border.description: Demonstrates how to apply a consistent background color and border style to all ListBox fields in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

rename-pdf-form-fields-camelcase.title: Rename PDF Form Fields to camelCase with Aspose.Pdf
rename-pdf-form-fields-camelcase.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, retrieve its form field names, convert them to camelCase, and rename the fields using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

add-print-button-with-javascript.title: Add Print Button with JavaScript to PDF
add-print-button-with-javascript.description: Shows how to insert a push‑button form field into a PDF and attach JavaScript that opens the print dialog using Aspose.Pdf.

hide-pdf-form-field-exportable.title: Hide PDF Form Field While Keeping It Exportable
hide-pdf-form-field-exportable.description: Shows how to set a PDF form field to hidden but still exportable using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

copy-notes-to-summary.title: Copy Notes Field to Summary in PDF Form
copy-notes-to-summary.description: Shows how to retrieve the value of a PDF form field (Notes) and copy it into another field (Summary) using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

shift-pdf-page-fields-right.title: Shift PDF Page Fields Right by 5 Points
shift-pdf-page-fields-right.description: Shows how to move the origin of page 2 in a PDF 5 points to the right using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, effectively shifting fields on that page.

restrict-discount-field-two-decimal.title: Restrict Discount Field to Two-Decimal Numeric Input
restrict-discount-field-two-decimal.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF form field named "Discount" to accept only numeric values with up to two decimal places using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and JavaScript validation.

add-submit-button-confirmation-dialog.title: Add Submit Button with Confirmation Dialog to PDF
add-submit-button-confirmation-dialog.description: Demonstrates how to add a submit button to a PDF form and attach JavaScript that shows a confirmation dialog before submitting the form.

add-gender-radio-button-group.title: Add Gender Radio Button Group to PDF Form
add-gender-radio-button-group.description: Shows how to create a PDF (if missing) and add a radio button group named "Gender" with options Male, Female, and Other, selecting "Male" by default using Aspose.Pdf FormEditor.

remove-temporary-form-fields-from-pdf.title: Remove Temporary Form Fields from PDF
remove-temporary-form-fields-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, enumerate its field names, and delete any fields whose names start with "Temp_" using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-single-line-field-to-multiline.title: Convert Single-Line PDF Form Field to Multiline for Auto-Wrap
convert-single-line-field-to-multiline.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to change a single‑line form field into a multiline field, enabling automatic text wrapping and dynamic height adjustment, then saves the updated PDF.

add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.title: Add Hidden AuthToken Field to PDF
add-hidden-authtoken-field-to-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a cryptographically secure token and embed it as a hidden text field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Facades API.

duplicate-pdf-form-field.title: Duplicate PDF Form Field Using FormEditor
duplicate-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to copy an existing form field named "Signature" to a new field "SignatureCopy" on the same page using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

move-logo-field-to-top-left.title: Move 'Logo' Form Field to Top‑Left Corner of First Page
move-logo-field-to-top-left.description: Loads a PDF, calculates a rectangle at the top‑left of the first page, moves the form field named "Logo" to that position using FormEditor, and saves the updated document.

set-custom-input-mask-for-pdf-form-field.title: Set Custom Input Mask for PDF Form Field
set-custom-input-mask-for-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to add a custom attribute to a PDF form field to represent an input mask (e.g., a phone number) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

attach-reset-form-js-clear-hidden-fields.title: Attach Reset Form JavaScript to Clear Hidden Fields
attach-reset-form-js-clear-hidden-fields.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade to attach JavaScript to a push‑button that resets the entire PDF form and clears specified hidden fields.

export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Field Layout to JSON
export-pdf-form-field-layout-to-json.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to export all form fields, including their layout rectangles, into a JSON file for UI reconstruction.

import-form-field-layout-from-json.title: Import Form Field Layout from JSON and Create PDF
import-form-field-layout-from-json.description: Shows how to deserialize a JSON file that describes form field names, types, pages, and coordinates, then generate a PDF and add those fields using Aspose.Pdf.

add-customername-text-field.title: Add CustomerName Text Field to PDF Page
add-customername-text-field.description: Shows how to insert a single‑line text field named "CustomerName" on page 1 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-unchecked-checkbox-field-to-pdf-page.title: Add Unchecked Checkbox Field to PDF Page
add-unchecked-checkbox-field-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert an unchecked checkbox form field named 'AgreeTerms' on the second page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

add-radio-button-group-to-pdf-form.title: Add Radio Button Group to PDF Form
add-radio-button-group-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to create a radio button group named "PaymentMethod" with options "Credit" and "PayPal" on page 3 of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor.

add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.title: Add Submit Button to PDF Form
add-submit-button-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to add a submit button named "SubmitForm" on page 1 of a PDF and configure it to post form data to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

attach-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-butt.title: Attach JavaScript Alert to PDF Push Button
attach-javascript-alert-to-pdf-push-butt.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to bind an existing PDF, add a JavaScript alert to a push button named "ShowInfo", and save the modified document.

decorate-pdf-form-field-appearance.title: Apply Custom Border, Background, and Font to PDF Form Field
decorate-pdf-form-field-appearance.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor with a FormFieldFacade to set custom border color, background shade, and font style for a specific PDF form field named "CustomerName" and save the updated PDF.

apply-default-decoration-to-text-fields.title: Apply Default Decoration to All Text Form Fields
apply-default-decoration-to-text-fields.description: Shows how to configure a FormFieldFacade with visual attributes and use FormEditor to apply the decoration to every text field in a PDF document.

set-pdf-form-field-alignment-to-center.title: Set PDF Form Field Alignment to Center
set-pdf-form-field-alignment-to-center.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to set the horizontal alignment of a form field named "Address" to center and save the modified PDF.

sign-pdf-with-custom-image-background.title: Sign PDF with Custom Image Background Appearance
sign-pdf-with-custom-image-background.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and apply a custom signature appearance where an image is used as the background.

set-form-field-attribute-with-formeditor.title: Set Form Field Attribute with FormEditor (Limited to Predefined Flags)
set-form-field-attribute-with-formeditor.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, attempting to set a field attribute using FormEditor.SetFieldAttribute, and explains that only predefined flags (e.g., NoExport) can be set, not arbitrary custom attributes, before saving the PDF.

add-header-image-center-align-form-field.title: Add Header Image and Center Align a Form Field
add-header-image-center-align-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to add a background header image to a PDF and center‑align the text of a specific form field using Aspose.Pdf Facades.
